description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a metallic gold finish and a black textured grip. The frame and slide are robust, with angular lines and a squared-off trigger guard. The grip features a checkered pattern for enhanced handling, and the magazine base is slightly beveled. The barrel is short and compact, with a visible muzzle opening at the front. There are no visible slide markings or engravings, giving the weapon a clean, minimalist appearance.
description: A gold-finished semi-automatic handgun with a black checkered grip and a compact, angular design. The weapon has a clean, unmarked slide and a beveled magazine base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gold slide, black checkered grip, and squared trigger guard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the slide and grip, with the hammer and rear sight visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip texture and the slide's angular lines.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the barrel's muzzle opening and the squared-off slide profile.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with a pronounced curve to fit the palm, featuring a black checkered texture for improved traction. It appears to be made of a polymer or rubberized material, providing both durability and comfort. The checkering is fine and covers most of the grip surface, with no visible logos or finger grooves. The grip panels are inset into the frame, and the overall design is utilitarian with a focus on secure handling.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is squared-off with a moderate thickness, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a slight undercut at the rear for improved grip ergonomics. The edges are clean and angular, with no visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is straightforward, lacking any integrated accessories or decorative elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and compact, consistent with standard semi-automatic handgun profiles. It has a smooth, gold finish matching the slide, with a visible muzzle opening. There are no external threads, ports, or compensators, and the barrel appears to be of a standard, non-fluted type.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, contributing to a minimalist and clean appearance.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is slightly beveled and flush with the bottom of the grip. It has a simple, flat design with no finger rest, flaring, or visible logos. The edges are smooth, and the baseplate integrates seamlessly with the grip's contour.
